title: onosma cinerea var. sanguinolenta
intro: Onosma cinerea var. sanguinolenta, also known as Bloodwort, is a plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). The health benefits of Bloodwort include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Bloodwort is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to support digestive health and overall well-being.
